query:
SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, psd.stationCode AS station_code, psd.businessDate,
       COUNT(*) AS detail_rows,
       COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS unique_events,
       SUM(psd.completedQty) AS completed_qty_sum,
       ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS display_points
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND psd.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name, psd.stationCode, psd.businessDate
ORDER BY u.name, psd.businessDate, psd.stationCode;
command:

       COUNT(*) AS detail_rows,
       COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS unique_events,
       SUM(psd.completedQty) AS completed_qty_sum,
       ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS display_points
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND psd.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND psd.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name, psd.stationCode, psd.businessDate
ORDER BY u.name, psd.businessDate, psd.stationCode;
